+<?pde version="3.8"?>
+<target name="jmc-target-${ECLIPSE_VERSION}" sequenceNumber="47">
+    <locations>
+        <location includeAllPlatforms="false" includeConfigurePhase="true" includeMode="planner" includeSource="true" type="InstallableUnit">
+            <unit id="org.eclipse.angus.jakarta.mail" version="${org.eclipse.angus.jakarta.mail.version}"/>
+            <unit id="angus-activation" version="${angus-activation.version}"/>
+            <unit id="org.owasp.encoder" version="${org.owasp.encoder.version}"/>
+            <unit id="lz4-java" version="${lz4-java.version}"/>
+            <unit id="org.hdrhistogram.HdrHistogram" version="${org.hdrhistogram.HdrHistogram.version}"/>
+            <unit id="org.adoptopenjdk.jemmy-awt-input" version="${org.adoptopenjdk.jemmy-awt-input.version}"/>
+            <unit id="org.adoptopenjdk.jemmy-browser" version="${org.adoptopenjdk.jemmy-browser.version}"/>
+            <unit id="org.adoptopenjdk.jemmy-core" version="${org.adoptopenjdk.jemmy-core.version}"/>
+            <unit id="org.adoptopenjdk.jemmy-swt" version="${org.adoptopenjdk.jemmy-swt.version}"/>
+            <unit id="org.osgi.service.servlet" version="${org.osgi.service.servlet.version}"/>
+            <unit id="org.jolokia.client.jmx-adapter" version="${org.jolokia.client.jmx-adapter.version}"/>
+            <unit id="org.jolokia.core" version="${org.jolokia.core.version}"/>
+            <unit id="org.jolokia.service.discovery" version="${org.jolokia.service.discovery.version}"/>
+            <unit id="org.jolokia.service.serializer" version="${org.jolokia.service.serializer.version}"/>
+            <unit id="org.jolokia.client.java" version="${org.jolokia.client.java.version}"/>
+            <unit id="org.jolokia.server.core" version="${org.jolokia.server.core.version}"/>
+            <unit id="com.github.tomakehurst.wiremock-standalone" version="${com.github.tomakehurst.wiremock-standalone.version}"/>
+            <unit id="org.eclipse.jetty.websocket.api" version="${org.eclipse.jetty.websocket.api.version}"/>
+            <unit id="org.eclipse.jetty.ee9.websocket.api" version="${org.eclipse.jetty.ee9.websocket.api.version}"/>
+            <unit id="org.eclipse.jetty.ee9.websocket.server" version="${org.eclipse.jetty.ee9.websocket.server.version}"/>
+            <unit id="org.eclipse.jetty.websocket.server" version="${org.eclipse.jetty.websocket.server.version}"/>
+            <unit id="org.eclipse.jetty.ee9.servlet" version="${org.eclipse.jetty.ee9.servlet.version}"/>
+            <unit id="org.eclipse.jetty.ee9.server" version="${org.eclipse.jetty.ee9.server.version}"/>
+            <unit id="org.eclipse.jetty.ee9.websocket.servlet" version="${org.eclipse.jetty.ee9.websocket.servlet.version}"/>
+            <unit id="org.eclipse.jetty.alpn.client" version="${org.eclipse.jetty.alpn.client.version}"/>
+            <unit id="org.eclipse.jetty.websocket.core.client" version="${org.eclipse.jetty.websocket.core.client.version}"/>
+            <unit id="org.eclipse.jetty.servlet-api" version="${org.eclipse.jetty.servlet-api.version}"/>
+            <unit id="jakarta.annotation-api" version="${jakarta.annotation-api.version}"/>
+            <unit id="org.apache.aries.spifly.dynamic.bundle" version="${org.apache.aries.spifly.dynamic.bundle.version}"/>
+            <unit id="fireplace-swing" version="${fireplace-swing.version}"/>
+            <unit id="fireplace-swt-awt-bridge" version="${fireplace-swt-awt-bridge.version}"/>
+            <unit id="fireplace-swing-animation" version="${fireplace-swing-animation.version}"/>
+            <unit id="radiance-animation" version="${radiance-animation.version}"/>
+            <unit id="org.awaitility" version="${org.awaitility.version}"/>
+            <repository location="http://localhost:8080/site"/>
+        </location>
+        <location includeAllPlatforms="false" includeConfigurePhase="true" includeMode="planner" includeSource="true" type="InstallableUnit">
+            <unit id="org.eclipse.equinox.executable.feature.group" version="${org.eclipse.equinox.executable.feature.group.version}"/>
+            <unit id="org.eclipse.pde.feature.group" version="${org.eclipse.pde.feature.group.version}"/>
+            <unit id="jakarta.servlet-api" version="${jakarta.servlet-api.version}"/>
+            <unit id="org.eclipse.equinox.p2.ui.sdk.scheduler" version="${org.eclipse.equinox.p2.ui.sdk.scheduler.version}"/>
+            <unit id="org.eclipse.equinox.p2.updatechecker" version="${org.eclipse.equinox.p2.updatechecker.version}"/>
+            <unit id="org.eclipse.update.configurator" version="${org.eclipse.update.configurator.version}"/>
+            <unit id="org.eclipse.equinox.p2.reconciler.dropins" version="${org.eclipse.equinox.p2.reconciler.dropins.version}"/>
+            <unit id="org.eclipse.help.webapp" version="${org.eclipse.help.webapp.version}"/>
+            <unit id="org.apache.commons.codec" version="${org.apache.commons.codec.version}"/>
+            <unit id="org.eclipse.rcp.feature.group" version="${org.eclipse.rcp.feature.group.version}"/>
+            <unit id="org.eclipse.help.feature.group" version="${org.eclipse.help.feature.group.version}"/>
+            <unit id="org.eclipse.equinox.p2.rcp.feature.feature.group" version="${org.eclipse.equinox.p2.rcp.feature.feature.group.version}"/>
+            <unit id="org.eclipse.ui.net" version="${org.eclipse.ui.net.version}"/>
+            <unit id="org.eclipse.equinox.p2.director.app" version="${org.eclipse.equinox.p2.director.app.version}"/>
+            <unit id="org.eclipse.ui.themes" version="${org.eclipse.ui.themes.version}"/>
+            <unit id="org.eclipse.sdk" version="${org.eclipse.sdk.version}"/>
+            <unit id="org.eclipse.osgi.services" version="${org.eclipse.osgi.services.version}"/>
+            <unit id="org.eclipse.emf.common.feature.group" version="${org.eclipse.emf.common.feature.group.version}"/>
+            <unit id="org.eclipse.emf.ecore.feature.group" version="${org.eclipse.emf.ecore.feature.group.version}"/>
+            <repository location="https://download.eclipse.org/releases/${ECLIPSE_VERSION}/" />
+        </location>
+        <location includeAllPlatforms="false" includeConfigurePhase="true" includeMode="planner" includeSource="true" type="InstallableUnit">
+            <unit id="org.eclipse.babel.nls_eclipse_ja.feature.group" version="${org.eclipse.babel.nls_eclipse_ja.feature.group.version}"/>
+            <unit id="org.eclipse.babel.nls_eclipse_zh.feature.group" version="${org.eclipse.babel.nls_eclipse_zh.feature.group.version}"/>
+            <!-- No new release yet - using 2022-12 -->
+            <repository location="https://archive.eclipse.org/technology/babel/update-site/R0.20.0/2022-12/"/>
+        </location>
+    </locations>
+    <targetJRE path="org.eclipse.jdt.launching.JRE_CONTAINER/org.eclipse.jdt.internal.debug.ui.launcher.StandardVMType/JavaSE-21"/>
+</target>
